_note: CONTRACT REFERENCE for the Strand-3 scout (Chunk 3). The daily UW opportunity scan writes this shape to the repo; the engine (uw_opportunity.uw_opportunity_cards) reads it into conviction-trail cards. signal_type ∈ [call_flow, sweep, oi_build, dark_pool_accum, gamma]; direction ∈ [bullish, bearish]; strength ∈ [strong, moderate, weak]. Malformed rows are skipped by the adapter.

signals.evidence: call OI +38% at 1300/1350 strikes, Jun expiry
